title: Effect of acceptance
doc_html:
Art. 1118.  Effect of acceptance

The person or agency to whom a child is surrendered shall exercise all rights and responsibilities as legal custodian of the child.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §11, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
